query:
SELECT configKey, configValue, LENGTH(configValue) as len
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_LIVE_FROM_NUMBER', 'TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER', 'TWILIO_TEST_ACCOUNT_SID', 'TWILIO_LIVE_ACCOUNT_SID')
ORDER BY configKey;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, configValue, LENGTH(configValue) as len
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_LIVE_FROM_NUMBER', 'TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER', 'TWILIO_TEST_ACCOUNT_SID', 'TWILIO_LIVE_ACCOUNT_SID')
ORDER BY configKey;
